series_metadata.series_description: Per O.R.C. 4121.36 (f) (g), this record series is a compilation of commission votes on varying decisions compiled in a journal (i.e., Commission level appeal acceptance votes, votes on requests for continuance and cancellation of Commission level hearings).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 90 days from date decision is published and ; Electronic: 90 days from date decision is published
